item.title: tony_calvin: Tony Calvin @tony_calvin · 47s RACING REVIEW section outside of Gold Dancer consisted of the following (and plenty more)
item.description: Tony Calvin @tony_calvin · 47s RACING REVIEW section outside of Gold Dancer consisted of the following (and plenty more) from 15-27 minutes *ITV viewing figures *That 100k bet at 8-1 analysed *Riding to win is to be applauded, even if executed badly *Not giving a horse every chance to win is not - BHA Mostrar más 3

item.title: RacingPost: Racing Post @RacingPost · 18min Meet the Racing Post's first ever Newmarket correspondent - who used it as the launchpad
item.description:
Racing Post @RacingPost · 18min Meet the Racing Post's first ever Newmarket correspondent - who used it as the launchpad for an astonishing career
Read more with RacingPost+ De racingpost.com 2 1 mil

item.title:

He’s out at the
item.description:
William Hill @WilliamHill · 9h Not again, Robbie Cita AFTV @AFTVMedia · 9h Robbie has done it AGAIN!
He’s out at the first time of asking after picking Manchester United to beat Leeds.
Think you can beat Lee Judges in Final One Standing? Enter on @WilliamHill and outlast him to win a share of £50K! It's free to 3 1 4 mil
